message:
fix(distributed): isolate recovery attempts, enforce max_attempts, tolerate corrupt symbols

Add reset_for_attempt() that clears per-attempt collection state
(collected symbols, ESI index, progress, metrics) at the start of each
recovery attempt. Previously, stale symbols from attempt N could leak
into attempt N+1, falsely satisfying decode thresholds and producing
corrupted recovery results.

Enforce max_attempts limit before starting a new attempt, returning an
explicit "recovery attempts exhausted" error instead of allowing
unbounded retries that could loop indefinitely on persistent failures.

Catch and skip CorruptedSymbol errors in add_collected_with_verify so a
single corrupt symbol does not abort an otherwise viable recovery
attempt. Non-corrupt errors still propagate immediately.

Add saturating_symbol_count() helper in StateDecoder to safely convert
usize to u32 without truncation on 64-bit platforms where source block
counts can exceed u32::MAX.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
